inputs.text: A stunning Korean woman with dark hair featuring face-framing caramel highlights, blunt cut with soft wispy bangs, partially submerged in a crystalline swimming pool. Oval face, monolid eyes with shimmering wet makeup, elegant and sophisticated expression. She wears a traditional hanbok in soft lavender and mint pastel tones, the silk fabric billowing ethereally underwater. Shot on 50mm lens, eye-level straight on, wide environmental portrait with her small in frame against the vast turquoise pool. Harsh midday sun pierces through the water surface creating sharp dappled shadows and caustic light patterns across her flawless skin. She tilts her chin slightly upward, serene and untouchable, water droplets catching sunlight like scattered diamonds. Photorealistic, no text, no watermarks.
